channel.title: Micropost on Konstantinos Chousos
channel.description: Recent content in Micropost on Konstantinos Chousos

item.description: Don’t mind me, just making some quick changes to this site, might even start posting again! This is a post to test the microposting feature I implemented hastily today. The goal is to use this similarly to something like Twitter 𝕏 for random thoughts and cool internet findings.
item.content:encoded:
Don’t mind me, just making some quick changes to this site, might even start posting again!

This is a post to test the microposting feature I implemented hastily today. The goal is to use this similarly to something like Twitter 𝕏 for random thoughts and cool internet findings.

item.description: Just testing for multiple notes and the list sorting.
item.content:encoded: Just testing for multiple notes and the list sorting.
